title: mirror lib+dispatcher into .bee/bin + distribution trees, regen manifest, full verify
action: Propagate the source-of-truth changes into every mirror so all standing guards go green. (1) Copy skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/perf.mjs -> .bee/bin/lib/perf.mjs byte-identical, and copy the edited skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs + lib/command-registry.mjs -> .bee/bin/ byte-identical (satisfy scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs which auto-derives the lib file list). (2) Re-sync the plugin-distribution copies under .claude/skills/bee-hive/templates/ and .agents/skills/bee-hive/templates/ (bee.mjs + lib/perf.mjs + lib/command-registry.mjs + tests) so distribution parity holds (governed by skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs). (3) Run node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write to regenerate the manifest (a new lib file makes --check red until regenerated — critical-patterns 20260715), then --check to confirm green. (4) Run the full recorded verify command and confirm every suite green; record its output as cap evidence.

truths: The full recorded verify command passes end-to-end.
prohibitions: Do NOT change behavior here — pure propagation + regen only.
Cap requires the FULL verify output as evidence, not an assertion.
